name: Potential Proxy Forwarding Configuration
notes: This rule triggers when a proxy port is configured to be used in forwarding. Adversaries may configure proxy ports to bypass network restrictions through tunneling.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: PortProxy Registry Key, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netsh Port Forwarding, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netsh RDP Port Forwarding
TD_list: APPLY Potential Proxy Forwarding Configuration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: PortProxy Registry Key, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netsh Port Forwarding, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netsh RDP Port Forwarding
RED_list: Event name: Potential Proxy Forwarding Configuration
Event description: Detects when a proxy port is configured to be used in forwarding. Adversaries may configure proxy ports to bypass network restrictions through tunneling.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
